reviews.name: 라****
reviews.content:
10.8kg 허리 긴 수컷 믹스견.
지금까지 많은 옷을 구매했지만 이렇게 찰떡같이 맞는 옷은 처음입니다. 진짜 너무 맘에 들어요. 옷 튼튼하고 입히기 쉽고 강아지의 움직임에도 간섭이 없어요. 완전 구매 추천합니다!! 다른 컬러도 구매예정
다음 버전이 나온다면 다리 밑단이 시보리로 나오면 좋을 것 같아요! 그리고 모자를 불편해 하는 강아지를 위해 모자에 작은 고리를 달아 어깨?등쪽에 걸 수 있게 나오면 좋을 것 같아요. 저는 뒤집어서 입히고 있어요!!
reviews.content_en:
10.8kg male mix with a long back.
I've bought many clothes for him so far, but this is the first time I've found something that fits so perfectly. I absolutely love it! The fabric is durable, easy to put on, and doesn't interfere with my dog's movement at all. I completely recommend buying it!! Planning to get other colors too.
If a next version comes out, I think it would be great if the legs had ribbed hems! And for dogs who find hats uncomfortable, it would be nice if there was a small loop on the hat so it could be hung on the shoulder or back area. I've been putting it on backwards!! 😄

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
3kg치와와라 워낙 추위에
약하고 겨울에는 심할정도로 떨어서 겨울 패딩
제품 정말 다양하게 입혀 봣는데요 엠사이즈 완전 딱 맞고 열기도 오래도록 가서 겨울 산책을 더 따뜻하게 오래 시켜줄수 있어서 넘 좋네요. 완전 추천입니다. 입고도 불편해 하지않고 총총총총 잘 걸어다녀요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My 3kg Chihuahua is really sensitive to the cold, and shakes severely in winter, so I've tried many winter padding products. The M size fits perfectly and retains heat for a long time, which lets me take longer, warmer walks in winter - it's amazing! Totally recommend it. He doesn't find it uncomfortable wearing it and walks around happily ㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
온몸이 빵빵한 패딩은 강쥐가 선호하지 않아서 올인원을 입하고 팔이 안달린 패딩을 입히고 있는데 바람 많이 부는 날에는 그나마도 뚫린부분으로 바람이 숭숭 들어오는거같아 찾고 있던 중 이 패딩을 발견했지뭐에요!
몸은 패디인데 팔다리 배는 기모후리스라니 🤍
오자마자 입히고 나갔는데 강아지도 편한지 산책도 잘하고 잘뛰고 활동성도 나무 좋아요 ! 감사합니다
reviews.content_en:
My pup doesn't prefer super puffy paddings that puff up all over, so I've been using an all-in-one with a padding that doesn't have sleeves. But on really windy days, wind keeps getting in through the open areas, so I was looking for something better and found this padding!
The body is padded but the arms, legs, and belly are fleece 🤍
I put it on him as soon as it arrived and took him out - my dog seems comfortable in it, walks well, runs well, and his activity level is great! Thank you!

reviews.name: 명****
reviews.content: 우리 토이푸들이 추위를 잘 타서, 요번에 한번 패딩을 구매해봤어요 :) 3킬로 인데 M이 딱 잘 맞아요. 올인원은 처음 입어보느라 많이 불편해하고 사진에도 우울해 보이는데, 추위 보호에는 좋은것 같아요! 가격대가 좀 높지만, 3겹 입고 + 난로 있어도 떠는 아이라서 이제 걱정 없이 겨울에도 밖에서 대소변을 볼수 있을것 같애요!
reviews.content_en: My Toy Poodle gets cold easily, so I decided to buy a padding this time :) He's 3kg and the M size fits perfectly. This is his first time wearing an all-in-one and he's pretty uncomfortable with it - he even looks sad in photos - but it does seem good for protecting against the cold! The price is a bit high, but since my pup shivers even with 3 layers on + a heater, I think now I can feel worry-free about him going outside for bathroom breaks in winter!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 넘 귀여워용 5.1키로 등길이 긴편인 믹스한테 잘 맞습니다!
reviews.content_en: So cute! 🥰 It fits my 5.1kg mix with a longer back really well!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content_en: My pup is 5kg and the fit is a bit roomy but fits well.
